reasoning: This is a roughly 3-month forecasting horizon from mid-November 2025 to early February 2026. Historically, US equity indexes like the Dow Jones Industrial Average exhibit positive returns over 3-month periods about 63-66% of the time. Additionally, the seasonality during the November to February period is historically stronger than average, supporting a probability slightly above the unconditional 3-month base rate. Without specific macroeconomic indicators pointing definitively in either direction for the exact upcoming quarter, relying heavily on the base rate is the most robust strategy. Thus, I estimate roughly a 64% chance of the index increasing.
